Letter 01
اولا الرساله الي وصلتك لهنا انا مش عارف اكتب هنا اي بصراحه فالكلام الانجليزي الي جاي ده بق حاولي تحلي معاه عشان انا سارقه من الai ولو فهمتي حاجه ابقي عرفيني 😂😂 انا حاسس ان ده عيد ميلادي مش ميلادك انتي والله 😂😂 يلا هاف أنيس داي
💗 💕 💗
🦋 🌺 🦋
🌸
Letter 02
Happy Birthday, NONY! 🎉✨ On this very special day, I wish you a new year filled with joy, success, and the kind of happiness that matches your beautiful heart. Having you in my life adds a truly wonderful and special touch, and you mean so much to me. I hope all your coming days are filled with laughter and moments that bring you joy, and that you achieve everything you aspire to. Happy Birthday, NONY! May you always be the beautiful blessing in my life that never fades. 🎂🎈
💖 💝 💖
🦋 🌸 🦋
✨
Letter 03
Today always reminds me of how amazing it is to have you in my life. You bring so much joy and positive energy wherever you are, and I am truly lucky and grateful for your presence. I wish you a new year filled with laughter, beautiful moments that make your heart happy, and all the success you deserve. I hope your day is as bright and wonderful as you are. Have a fantastic birthday, NONY, and may you always keep shining! ✨🎈 طلاق تلاته معرف الكلام ده معناه اي بس شكلو حلو
❤️ 💓 ❤️
